case_title: THEE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. DANIELLE TURNER

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THEE JOHN STEWART COMPANY ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT TURNER, DANIELLE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THEE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TURNER, DANIELLE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF THEE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
ORDER ON PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR AN ORDER ENTERING UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT AND SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THEE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURNER, DANIELLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: - $6,042.11 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,042.11, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
